7402 E D St, Tacoma, WA 98404, USA

A large park in Tacoma maintained by volunteers. This used to be a blueberry farm. Many different varieties. Free U Pick. There are many pickers, but also lots of plants. Also several apple trees and a few crabapple trees. Blackberries in the far back corner.
Two story pear. Fruit seen on tree. Access: Private.
8420 Portland Ave E, Tacoma, WA 98445, USA
1 tree on edge of overgrown empty lot. Produce good amount of fruit late August to September. Access: Public.
